mapper.select: SELECT COALESCE(SUM(e.amount), 0) AS totalAmount, COALESCE(SUM(e.amount) / NULLIF(( SELECT COUNT(*) FROM trip_member WHERE trip_id = #{tripId} AND invitation_status = 'ACCEPTED' ), 0), 0) AS avgPerPerson FROM expense e WHERE e.trip_id = #{tripId}
SELECT category, SUM(amount) AS totalAmount, COUNT(*) AS count FROM expense WHERE trip_id = #{tripId} GROUP BY category ORDER BY totalAmount DESC

SELECT e.expense_id AS expenseId, e.description, e.amount, e.category, TO_CHAR(e.expense_date, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS expenseDate, e.payment_type AS paymentType, m.nickname AS payerNickname, ep.share_amount AS shareAmount, ep.is_settled AS isSettled FROM expense e JOIN member m ON m.member_id = e.payer_id JOIN expense_participant ep ON ep.expense_id = e.expense_id WHERE e.trip_id = #{tripId} AND ep.member_id = #{myMemberId} ORDER BY e.expense_date DESC
